creator: roberto@eurocontrol.fr
text:
The port for gdkxft (x11/gdkxft) is out-of-date, the current version is
	now 1.4.

    It is now downloadable from sourceforge.net instead of its previous
	location.

Fix: 

Update the port and the patches (no time to do it, sorry).
How-To-Repeat: 	Look on http://sourceforge.net/project/showfiles.php?group_id=38513
